reason: Biohazard areas must not be adjacent to food/rest areas
reasonZh: 生物安全区域必须与休息/饮食区域分离

reason: BSL-2+ labs require airlock entry for containment integrity
reasonZh: BSL-2及以上实验室需要气闸入口以保持密封完整性

reason: Personnel must don/doff PPE before entering biosafety zones
reasonZh: 人员进入生物安全区域前必须在更衣室穿脱防护装备

reason: Chemical fumes and spill risk must be isolated from food/rest areas
reasonZh: 化学品气味和泄漏风险必须与饮食/休息区域隔离

reason: Chemical storage must not be adjacent to main entry for emergency egress safety
reasonZh: 化学品储存区不得靠近主入口，以确保紧急疏散安全

reason: Waste handling areas must be separated from food/rest areas to prevent contamination
reasonZh: 废物处理区域必须与饮食/休息区域分离以防止污染

reason: Proximity reduces hazardous material transport distance through occupied areas
reasonZh: 邻近布置可减少危险物质在人员活动区域的运输距离

reason: PCR rooms benefit from proximity to general lab for sample transfer efficiency
reasonZh: PCR隔离室宜靠近通用实验室，便于样品高效转移

reason: Clean rooms require airlock entry to maintain positive pressure and particle control
reasonZh: 洁净室需要气闸入口以维持正压和颗粒物控制

reason: Gowning room must be immediately adjacent to clean room entry sequence
reasonZh: 更衣室必须紧邻洁净室入口序列

reason: Developers benefit from quick access to compute resources for testing and debugging
reasonZh: 开发人员受益于快速访问计算资源进行测试和调试

reason: Reduces transition time between collaborative and individual work
reasonZh: 减少协作与个人工作之间的转换时间

reason: Natural wayfinding places workspace near entry for visitor orientation
reasonZh: 自然寻路设计将工作区置于入口附近，便于访客定向

reason: Reduce unnecessary traffic through storage areas and improve security
reasonZh: 减少存储区域的不必要人员流动，提高安全性

reason: Iterative design benefits from proximity between fabrication and prototyping
reasonZh: 迭代设计受益于制造与原型制作的邻近布置

reason: Quick test-iterate cycles require nearby testing facilities
reasonZh: 快速测试迭代循环需要就近的测试设施

reason: Minimizes chemical transport distance and exposure risk
reasonZh: 最大限度减少化学品运输距离和暴露风险

reason: Reduces hazardous waste transport distance through occupied corridors
reasonZh: 减少危险废物通过人员通道的运输距离

reason: Electronics and chemical fumes/spills are incompatible; corrosion and fire risk
reasonZh: 电子设备与化学品烟雾/泄漏不兼容，存在腐蚀和火灾风险

reason: Simulation workloads benefit from low-latency access to compute infrastructure
reasonZh: 仿真工作负载受益于对计算基础设施的低延迟访问

reason: Observation rooms should have direct visual access to laboratory activities
reasonZh: 观察室应能直接观察实验室活动

reason: Allows mentors and visitors to observe maker activities without entering work zone
reasonZh: 允许导师和访客在不进入工作区的情况下观察制造活动

reason: Biosafety zones must not open directly to building entrance for containment
reasonZh: 生物安全区域不得直接通向建筑入口，以确保密封性

reason: Dust and particulate from makerspace operations contaminate clean room environments
reasonZh: 制造空间产生的灰尘和颗粒物会污染洁净室环境

reason: Mechanical/electrical utilities should be near compute for efficient power and cooling distribution
reasonZh: 机电设施应靠近计算区域，以实现高效的电力和冷却分配

reason: Rapid iteration requires quick transition between prototype build and test validation
reasonZh: 快速迭代需要在原型制作和测试验证之间快速转换

reason: Waste handling areas must not be adjacent to main entry for hygiene and safety
reasonZh: 废物处理区域不得靠近主入口，以确保卫生和安全

reason: Sequential gowning-airlock entry flow improves contamination control
reasonZh: 依次的更衣-气闸入口流程有助于改善污染控制
